name: Enterprise Title
description_short: Enterprise Title provides residential and commercial real estate title services, closings, and lender services across Indiana and Kentucky with a focus on wire fraud prevention.
description_long:
Enterprise Title is a title services and closing company operating in Indiana and Kentucky with two physical locations: Indianapolis (8500 Keystone Crossing) and Louisville (906 Lily Creek Rd). The company serves home buyers, sellers, real estate agents, and lenders throughout the real estate transaction lifecycle. Founded on the motto "Simply Service," Enterprise Title positions itself as an experienced team managing complex real estate transactions from purchase agreement through final settlement.

The company offers three primary service lines: Residential Services for home buyers and sellers, Commercial Services for complex commercial real estate transactions, and Lender Services for mortgage origination and loan closings. On the residential side, Enterprise Title handles title search ordering, chain of title examination, title commitment preparation, requirement satisfaction, closing document preparation, and fund disbursement. They coordinate with lenders throughout the process, prepare Closing Disclosure documents, and manage the execution of title and loan documents. The company emphasizes educating consumers about title insurance and protecting against adverse title claims.

Enterprise Title distinguishes itself through specific focus on wire fraud prevention, offering educational resources and adopted protocols to prevent wire fraud in closings. They provide sellers with a net sheet calculator tool to estimate fees and proceeds. The company emphasizes their coordination with lenders and ability to manage complicated commercial transactions that might otherwise slow or halt deals. Their staff positions itself as available to answer questions throughout the settlement process.

As a regional title services provider rather than a mortgage lender, Enterprise Title does not originate loans or provide mortgage financing directly. They function as a closing and title services partner in the mortgage transaction, not as a primary lender. Their services are transaction-dependent and available only in Indiana and Kentucky. The company's website provides limited information about pricing, turn times, or specific service guarantees.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Dedicated wire fraud prevention protocols and educational resources to protect clients from wire fraud during closings
Dual-state presence with offices in Indianapolis and Louisville allowing service across Indiana and Kentucky
Comprehensive residential closing services from title search through final disbursement and document handling
Commercial real estate expertise specifically marketed for complicated transactions that could delay deals
Online sellers net sheet calculator tool to estimate fees and proceeds upfront
Title insurance education resources explaining coverage and protection for consumers
Coordination with lenders on loan closing packages and Closing Disclosure preparation
cons: Limited to two states (Indiana and Kentucky) with no multi-state national presence
Website provides no information on pricing, fees, or service timelines for closing transactions
Does not originate mortgages or provide financing—functions only as closing/title services partner
No online closing or digital document execution capabilities mentioned on website
Limited transparency about title insurance carriers used or coverage options available
best_for: Home buyers and sellers completing residential transactions in Indiana or Kentucky
Commercial real estate investors and developers navigating complicated multi-party deals
Mortgage lenders seeking reliable closing partners in the Indianapolis and Louisville markets
diagnosis: Enterprise Title is best for home buyers, sellers, and lenders in Indiana and Kentucky who need experienced title services and closing coordination for residential or commercial real estate transactions. The main caveat is that they are a closing/title services provider only—not a mortgage lender—so they cannot originate loans or provide financing themselves.
services: Lender origination and loan closing services
Chain of title search and ordering
Wire fraud prevention protocols and education
Final document execution and closing coordination
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
